text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Formulary File Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 2.2 
16 
STEP_THERAPY_YN 
LABEL: 
Step Therapy Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: This is a CCW-derived field that indicates whether the prescription was subject to a step therapy 
protocol, according to the benefit structure and formulary for the beneficiary’s plan. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: STEP_THERAPY_YN 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes
